reasoning: Both A and B contain the key facts needed to answer the question correctly: LVMH Q1 2026 revenue was about €19.1 billion, group organic growth was 1%, Fashion & Leather Goods declined 2% organically, and the Middle East/Iran war/conflict had about a 1 percentage point negative impact on organic growth.
